tasks.subject: Task 0: CSS Token System, Dark Mode & Visual Refresh
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace all hardcoded colors in `style.css` with CSS custom properties and add automatic dark mode.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/style.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `:root` block defines 9 tokens
- [ ] `@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark)` overrides all 9 tokens
- [ ] No hardcoded color values remain (except Ko-fi orange)
- [ ] Drop-zone hover uses `box-shadow` + border-color
- [ ] `header h1` has `letter-spacing: -0.02em`
- [ ] Progress bar height is `8px`
- [ ] All interactive `border-radius` is `8px`

**Verify:** `npm run dev` → toggle system dark/light mode → no artifacts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/style.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["9 CSS tokens in :root", "dark mode override block", "no hardcoded colors", "box-shadow on dragover", "letter-spacing on h1", "progress bar 8px", "border-radius 8px"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: HTML Structure Updates
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update `index.html` to remove Claude tagline, add options toggle markup, and add legal footer.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Subtitle reads "Browser-basiert · Datenschutzfreundlich"
- [ ] `#page-range` replaced by `#options-toggle` + `#options-panel`
- [ ] `#options-panel` has `range-start` and `range-end` inputs
- [ ] `<footer>` at end of `#app` with Impressum/Datenschutz links to fieber-it.com

**Verify:** `npm run dev` → page loads, footer visible

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html"], "verifyCommand": "npm run dev", "acceptanceCriteria": ["subtitle no Claude mention", "options-toggle + options-panel in DOM", "footer with two links"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: JS Options Toggle Wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Update `upload.js` to wire options toggle and remove old >100-page auto-show logic.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/ui/upload.js`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `#page-range` ref removed, replaced with `#options-toggle` + `#options-panel`
- [ ] Toggle shown after file loads and after password unlock
- [ ] Click toggles panel + updates button text ▼/▲
- [ ] `getPageRange()` returns null when panel hidden
- [ ] Old `numPages > 100` logic removed
- [ ] `npm test` passes

**Verify:** `npm test` → all pass; manual: upload PDF → Optionen toggle works → convert respects range

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ui/upload.js"], "verifyCommand": "npm test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no #page-range ref", "toggle visible after load", "getPageRange returns null when hidden", "numPages>100 logic gone", "tests pass"]}
```
